JOB_APPLICATIONS.TITLE: Tell us about yourself
JOB_APPLICATIONS.FIRST_NAME_REQUIRED: The first name field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.LAST_NAME_REQUIRED: The last name field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.STREET_REQUIRED: The street address field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.HAS_CLEANING_EXPERIENCE_QUESTION: Do you have professional cleaning experience?
JOB_APPLICATIONS.HAS_CLEANING_EXPERIENCE_REQUIRED: The has cleaning experience field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.HAS_BANK_ACCOUNT_QUESTION: Do you have a bank account for direct deposit?
JOB_APPLICATIONS.HAS_BANK_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED: The has bank account field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.IS_AUTHORIZED_TO_WORK_QUESTION: Are you legally authorized to work in the United States?
JOB_APPLICATIONS.IS_AUTHORIZED_TO_WORK_REQUIRED: The is authorized to work field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.CONSENT_BACKGROUND_CHECK_QUESTION: Do you consent to a free background check?
JOB_APPLICATIONS.CONSENT_BACKGROUND_CHECK_REQUIRED: The consent to a free background check field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.CLEANING_EXPERIENCE_DESCRIPTION: Tell us about your professional cleaning experience
JOB_APPLICATIONS.CLEANING_EXPERIENCE_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOL: Please describe your cleaning experience, including any professional or personal experience. What types of cleaning have you done? What tools and products are you familiar with?
JOB_APPLICATIONS.CLEANING_EXPERIENCE_DESCRIPTION_REQUIRED: The cleaning experience description field is required.
JOB_APPLICATIONS.RECENT_EARNINGS_DESC: See what other cleaners in your zip code earned last week
JOB_APPLICATIONS.ADD_PHOTO_DESC: Please upload a photo for your bio. This is used to notify the client of your arrival for safety purposes. We're excited to work with you!
JOB_APPLICATIONS.VIDEO_INTERVIEW_DESC: Please record a 60-second video answering the following question:
JOB_APPLICATIONS.VIDEO_QUESTION: "Why would you be a great fit for our team?"
JOB_APPLICATIONS.HELP_US_KNOW_YOU: This helps us get to know you better

ACCOUNT.TITLE: Account Settings
ACCOUNT.DESCRIPTION: Manage your subscription and billing preferences
ACCOUNT.CURRENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DESC_TRIALING: You're currently on a free trial with full access to all features.
ACCOUNT.CURRENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DESC_ACTIVE: Your subscription is active and all features are available.
ACCOUNT.CURRENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DESC_PAST_DUE: Your payment is past due. Some features may be restricted until payment is completed.
ACCOUNT.CURRENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DESC_CANCELED: Your subscription has been canceled. You will lose access after the current billing period ends.
ACCOUNT.CURRENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DESC_INCOMPLETE: Your subscription is incomplete. Please complete the payment process.
ACCOUNT.CURRENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DESC_INCOMPLETE_EXP: Your subscription could not be activated because the initial payment failed.
ACCOUNT.CURRENT_SUBSCRIPTION_DESC_UNPAID: Your subscription is unpaid and currently inactive. Please update your payment details.
ACCOUNT.NEED_HELP_DESC: Have questions about your trial or need assistance? Contact our support team at support@company.com or schedule a demo to see how our platform can help your business grow.
